mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CONTRACT_CLAUSE (CONTRACT_TYPE, CLAUSE_NO, CLAUSE_TITLE, CLAUSE_CONTENT, IS_ACTIVE, SORT_ORDER, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{contractType}, #{clauseNo}, #{clauseTitle}, #{clauseContent}, 1, #{sortOrder}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT CLAUSE_IDX, CONTRACT_TYPE, CLAUSE_NO, CLAUSE_TITLE, CLAUSE_CONTENT, IS_ACTIVE, SORT_ORDER, date_format(CREATED_AT, '%Y-%m-%d') as CREATED_AT, date_format(UPDATED_AT, '%Y-%m-%d') as UPDATED_AT FROM TB_CONTRACT_CLAUSE WHERE CLAUSE_IDX = #{clauseIdx}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_CONTRACT_CLAUSE SET CONTRACT_TYPE = #{contractType}, CLAUSE_NO = #{clauseNo}, CLAUSE_TITLE = #{clauseTitle}, CLAUSE_CONTENT = #{clauseContent}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, IS_ACTIVE = #{isActive}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE CLAUSE_IDX = #{clauseIdx}
UPDATE TB_CONTRACT_CLAUSE SET IS_ACTIVE = 0, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE CLAUSE_IDX = #{clauseIdx}
mapper.select: SELECT CLAUSE_IDX, CONTRACT_TYPE, CLAUSE_NO, CLAUSE_TITLE, CLAUSE_CONTENT, IS_ACTIVE, SORT_ORDER, date_format(CREATED_AT, '%Y-%m-%d') as CREATED_AT FROM TB_CONTRACT_CLAUSE WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 1 ORDER BY CONTRACT_TYPE, SORT_ORDER ASC, CLAUSE_NO ASC

SELECT CLAUSE_IDX, CONTRACT_TYPE, CLAUSE_NO, CLAUSE_TITLE, CLAUSE_CONTENT, IS_ACTIVE, SORT_ORDER, date_format(CREATED_AT, '%Y-%m-%d') as CREATED_AT FROM TB_CONTRACT_CLAUSE WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 1 AND CONTRACT_TYPE = #{contractType} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC, CLAUSE_NO ASC

SELECT C.CLAUSE_IDX, C.CONTRACT_TYPE, C.CLAUSE_NO, C.CLAUSE_TITLE, C.CLAUSE_CONTENT, C.IS_ACTIVE, C.SORT_ORDER FROM TB_CONTRACT_CLAUSE C INNER JOIN TB_CONTRACT_CLAUSE_CONFIRM CC ON C.CLAUSE_IDX = CC.CLAUSE_IDX WHERE CC.CONTRACT_IDX = #{contractIdx} ORDER BY C.SORT_ORDER ASC, C.CLAUSE_NO ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CONTRACT_CLAUSE WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 1
